secret_policy: Do not store secret values in this manifest.

blockers.note: Earlier signup attempts hit Supabase Auth HTTP 429. The parent closeout retry used a redacted example.com address and returned HTTP 400 invalid email instead. The final parent run scanned local env files for TEST/QA/SIGNUP/EMAIL/MAIL keys and found no owned test mailbox configuration. Signup submit was not attempted to avoid third-party email or PII. Resume with an owned test mailbox or explicitly accept this as a blocker.

Approved by the current user request and attempted again. The final parent run started Colima, used the Colima Docker socket, completed supabase stop --no-backup, then ran supabase start. It progressed through image pulls, including realtime and logflare, but stalled before local services became available. db reset and DB verification were not reached. Exact blocker: local_db_reset_recreate_incomplete_image_pull_stalled.

Resolved for the current application-code proof in the final parent run. browser-use profile update installed profile-use, browser-use doctor passed all checks, and env-injected home/login proof was captured under output/release-prep/final-closeout-20260618-parent/browser-use-current/. verify-browser-use-proof passed with release_date 2026-06-18, environment staging, and the app-code commit captured in the proof. After the docs-only blocker commit, release:doctor stops at unresolved blockers before evaluating Browser Use proof; recapture Browser Use against the final git commit if those blockers are later resolved, accepted, or waived.
